title: 1.1 Confidential Information Definition
risk_reason_expert: Standard broad definition, mutual obligations, no unusual scope.
key_text_fragment: hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence

title: 2.3 Confidentiality Term 5 Years
risk_reason_expert: 5-year term above industry standard of 2-3 years but not unreasonable for AI/tech IP.
key_text_fragment: five (5) years from the Effective Date

title: 3.1 IP Ownership Disclosing Party Retains Rights
risk_reason_expert: Standard IP retention clause. No license grant appropriate for NDA context.
key_text_fragment: remain the sole and exclusive property of the Disclosing Party

title: 4.1 Auto-Renewal with 60-Day Notice
risk_reason_expert: Auto-renews annually unless terminated 60 days before expiry. Missed notice creates unintended renewal.
key_text_fragment: automatically renew for successive one (1) year periods...sixty (60) days

title: 4.2 Termination for Convenience 30 Days
risk_reason_expert: Standard mutual termination right. 30-day notice is reasonable.

title: 5.1 Consequential Damages Exclusion
risk_reason_expert: Mutual exclusion caps exposure but limits recovery on breach.
key_text_fragment: IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT

title: 5.2 Direct Damages Cap USD 50000
risk_reason_expert: USD 50,000 cap low relative to USD 25,000 fee and AI IP value. Consider negotiating higher.
key_text_fragment: shall not exceed United States Dollars Fifty Thousand (USD 50,000)

title: 5.3 Mutual Indemnification
risk_reason_expert: Mutual breach-triggered indemnification. Reasonable attorneys fees included. Bounded by 5.2 cap.
key_text_fragment: indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other Party

title: 6.1 Dataset Access Fee USD 25000 30 Days
risk_reason_expert: One-time payment USD 25,000 within 30 days. Clear obligation. 1.5%/month late interest is high.
key_text_fragment: pay Party A a one-time access fee of United States Dollars Twenty-Five Thousand

title: 8.1-8.3 Force Majeure
risk_reason_expert: Standard clause. 90-day extended event right reasonable. Pandemic included. 5-day notice is tight.
